violations.text: The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Outside dumpster was observed too close to fence and unable to close. Establishment must have dumpster moved to a location where dumpster can be properly covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the storage area (back door) is in poor repair, observed torn with improper seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
